name: Encoded PowerShell Command Detected
description: Detects the execution of encoded PowerShell commands, a technique used by adversaries to evade detection by obfuscating malicious code. This rule identifies the use of the `-EncodedCommand` (or its short form `-enc`) parameter in PowerShell.

prompts.prompt: Encoded PowerShell command execution detected, often used to obfuscate malicious code. Event Details: **Timestamp** {Timestamp}, **Event ID** {EventID}, **User** {user}, **Process Name** {process_name}, **Command** {command}. Investigate this high-risk activity immediately for potential defense evasion and malicious script execution.

parameters.name: EventID
parameters.description: The Event ID for Process Creation (e.g., 1).

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which the process ran.

parameters.name: command
parameters.description: The full command line, including the encoded command parameter.
